title: Context Collector — Output Contract (CONTEXT_RESULT)
description: Schema for the CONTEXT_RESULT block returned by the context-collector skill upon completion of any action.

action.description: The action that was executed, echoed from the input CONTRACT.

status.description: Outcome of the context collection or update operation.

job_name.description: The JOB_NAME from the input. Null when context-collector was run standalone without a job folder.

context_path.description: Absolute or ~ -rooted path to the written context.md file.

version.description: Document version in MAJOR.MINOR format. Starts at '1.0' for new documents; incremented on each update (e.g. '1.1', '1.2').

summary.description: 2-3 sentence human-readable summary of what context was collected or updated and which key sources were used.

sections_collected.description: List of section names or identifiers that were written into the context document. Maps to top-level headings in context.md.

sections.description: Counts of sources processed in each research phase.

local_sources.description: Number of local documentation files, rules, and job artifacts used.

external_sources.description: Number of external URLs fetched during Phase 3.

rules_applied.description: Number of project rules extracted and included.

libraries_documented.description: Number of npm packages or libraries documented with API summaries.

errors.description: List of non-fatal errors or warnings encountered during execution. Empty array on clean success. Populated even when status is 'success' if any sources were skipped.

phase.description: The execution phase in which the error occurred.

source.description: The specific URL, file path, or resource that caused the error.

message.description: Human-readable description of the error or warning.

action_taken.description: What the agent did in response to the error, e.g. 'Skipped source', 'Continued with remaining sources'.

error_details.description: Present only when status is 'error'. A human-readable explanation of the fatal error that prevented completion.

examples.summary: Collected context for the SaveMode component implementation. Sourced 3 local docs, 2 relevant rules (code-style-patterns, mobx-store-template), and documented MobX 6 and mobx-react-lite APIs from official docs. No previous related jobs found.
Updated context with tanstack/query optimistic update patterns. Added new 'Libraries & APIs' subsection for @tanstack/react-query v5. Existing sections preserved unchanged.

errors.action_taken: Skipped source, used alternative URL instead.

examples.error_details: Job folder '.metaproject/jobs/nonexistent-job' does not exist. Orchestrator must initialize the job before calling context-collector.
